suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'Wiring Guardrail Tests' section documenting the naming convention `wiring_<subject>_<invariant>` and the use of `OrchestratorBuilder` production path. Currently this convention is only documented in `architecture.md` under '5. Wiring Guardrail Test Suite', making it harder for contributors to discover.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature refactor-02-wiring-test-and-docs followed this convention but AGENTS.md had no reference to it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the canonical list of 13 subsystem names that must implement WiringReport: TaskStateMachine, AgentPool, CheckpointManager, FeatureLeadManager, McpConfigManager, NoveltyChecker, FileLockManager, NonNovelRetryDetector, FrozenRequirementRegistry, LlmBackend, ExecutionController, CostGuard, PreToolHookManager. Currently derived from source code inspection by workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature refactor-02-wiring-test-and-docs hardcoded this list after reading source code. architecture.md describes the trait and method but not the concrete subsystem list.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add documentation for wrapper-pattern approach for Arc-wrapped subsystem fields in wiring.rs
rejectedObservations.reason: Pattern is specific to this refactor and not general enough to warrant documentation as a reusable pattern
The worker used only standard cargo commands already documented in services.yaml
